title: minecraft:map_tints
description: Sets the color grass and foliage will be tinted by in this biome on the map.

foliage.description: Sets the color foliage will be tinted by in this biome on the map.

grass.description: Controls whether the grass will use a custom tint color or a noise based tint color.

oneOf.description: Sets the color grass will be tinted by in this biome on the map.
Makes grass use the noise based colors for tinting in this biome on the map.

color_rgb_255.title: Color255RGB
color_rgb_255.description: An RGB color expressed as a hex string or an array of three integers in the 0-255 range.

grass_noise.title: custom_map_tint_grass_noise
grass_noise.description: Makes grass use the noise based colors for tinting in this biome on the map.

type.description: Controls the type of grass tint to use.
type.title: GrassType

grass_tint.title: custom_map_tint_grass_tint
grass_tint.description: Sets the color grass will be tinted by in this biome on the map.

tint.description: Tint color used in this biome on the map.

type.description: Controls the type of grass tint to use.
type.title: GrassType
